ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, DEFENDANT CAMPBELL CONSTRUCTION CO.'S MOTION TO TRANSFER. THIS MATTER IS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CAMPBELL CONSTRUCTION CO.'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION. PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 397(C) AND UPON PAYMENT OF ALL NECESSARY FEES, THE CASE SHALL BE TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF SACRAMENTO. THE CLERK OF THIS COURT IS AUTHORIZED TO TRANSFER ALL THE PLEADING AND PAPERS TO THE COURT CLERK OF SACRAMENTO COUNTY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2019 Off Calendar

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jan-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CAMPBELL CONSTRUCTION CO.'S MOTION TO TRANSFER

Appearances: James P. Nevin of Brayton Purcell (415.898.1555) for plaintiff and responding party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Campbell Construction Co.'s motion to transfer venue is granted. No opposition. Pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 397(c) and upon payment of all necessary fees, the case shall be transferred to Superior Court of California, County of Sacramento. The clerk of this court is authorized to transfer all the pleading and papers to the court clerk of Sacramento County. Order signed. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
